articles.title: Red Sox face all too familiar question heading into MLB trade deadline: Buy or sell?
articles.description:
Boston's recent string of wins has it within striking distance of a wildcard spot.

The post Red Sox face all too familiar question heading into MLB trade deadline: Buy or sell? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox's recent wins put them in contention for a wildcard spot.
The MLB trade deadline is approaching on July 31, 2023.
Boston residents are eager to see if the team will strengthen its roster.

articles.title: Review & Setlist: Shakira delivers high-energy nostalgia and new beginnings at TD Garden
articles.description:
After a seven-year hiatus from releasing music, Shakira turned her difficult phase of life into an LP that won the 2025 Grammy for Best Latin Pop Album.

The post Review & Setlist: Shakira delivers high-energy nostalgia and new beginnings at TD Garden appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Shakira performed at TD Garden, marking her return after a seven-year music hiatus.
Her new LP won the 2025 Grammy for Best Latin Pop Album, showcasing her resilience.
Boston residents enjoyed a high-energy concert, celebrating Shakira's nostalgia and new beginnings.
